_description: Create an email sequence (subsequence) for an Instantly campaign. Must exist before leads show in campaign UI.
_tool: N/A - use curl directly, not yet in instantly.sh
_gotchas: Subsequences MUST be created before leads appear in campaign UI
Each step has delay (days) and variants (array of {subject, body})
name: Main Sequence

_field_map.parent_campaign: Campaign UUID from instantly.sh create-campaign response
_field_map.delay: Days after previous step. 0 = send immediately when lead is added
_field_map.variants: Array of subject/body pairs. Multiple variants = A/B test
_field_map.type: Always 'email' for now. Instantly may add other types later.

_personalization_variables.{{custom.signal_thesis}}: Custom variable from lead payload object
